nasb.text: And Manasseh slept with his fathers and was buried in the garden of his own house, in the garden of Uzza, and Amon his son became king in his place.

esv.text: And Manasseh slept with his fathers and was buried in the garden of his house, in the garden of Uzza, and Amon his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 瑪拿西和他的祖先一同長眠，葬在他宮中的花園、烏撒的花園裡；他的兒子亞們接續他作王。

ccb.text: 他与祖先同眠后，葬在他王宫的花园。即乌撒花园，他儿子亚们继位。
